activities.title: Meet Up at Terminal 2
activities.description: Please don't be late! If you're bringing a lot of luggage or living far away, make sure to leave early to avoid any rush.

activities.title: Flight Boarding
activities.description: Ensure your cabin baggage and checked luggage are properly separated. Double-check everything so nothing gets left behind.

activities.title: Flight OTW Bali ✈️
activities.description: Sit back, relax, and enjoy the flight — Bali is just around two hours away. Get some rest or grab a snack!

activities.title: Arrival at Ngurah Rai
activities.description: Collect your luggage at the carousel and don't forget to take a group photo at the iconic 'Welcome to Bali' sign!

activities.title: Pick Up Rental Car
activities.description: Head to the airport parking area to pick up the rental car. Remember to do a quick condition check before driving off.

activities.title: STUJA di Pantai
activities.description: Chill and enjoy the morning vibes at STUJA beach club in Sanur. Perfect spot to start the Bali trip right!

activities.title: Head to Ubud
activities.description: Refuel if necessary and grab some more snacks for the trip down to our villa in Ubud.

activities.title: Villa Check-in
activities.description: Arrive at the villa, unpack, and take a moment to freshen up and rest after the long journey.

activities.title: Stroll Around Jl. Gootama
activities.description: Take a relaxed evening walk around Jalan Gootama, enjoying the vibrant Ubud nightlife and boutique shops.

activities.title: Dinner at Pison Ubud
activities.description: Wrap up our first day with a cozy dinner, great coffee, and live music at Pison.

activities.title: Free Time — Morning Ubud
activities.description: Free morning in Ubud. Stroll through the market, grab coffee at a local cafe, or just soak in the peaceful early morning vibes before the day begins.

activities.title: ATV Ubud
activities.description: Kick off the day with an adrenaline-pumping ATV ride through Ubud's rice fields and jungle trails.

activities.title: Checkout Villa & Head to Seminyak
activities.description: Pack up, check out, and hit the road to Seminyak.

activities.title: Villa Check-in Seminyak
activities.description: Arrive at the Seminyak villa, freshen up, and get ready for the rest of the day.

activities.title: Free Time — Each Family
activities.description: Time to explore on your own! Each family is free to do whatever they like — rest, explore Seminyak, spa, shopping, or just chill by the pool.

activities.title: Nasi Tempong Indra
activities.description: Dinner at the legendary Nasi Tempong Indra — bold flavors, generous portions, pure Bali.

activities.title: Free Time — Night Out
activities.description: The night is yours! Explore Seminyak's nightlife, go bar hopping, or just relax at the villa. Everyone does their own thing.

activities.title: Free Time — Morning
activities.description: Wake up slow, grab breakfast on your own, and enjoy the morning however you like before the day kicks off.

activities.title: Gigi Susu or Sunday Market La Brisa
activities.description: Pick your vibe — grab coffee and milk bread at Gigi Susu, or hit the Sunday Market at La Brisa for local vendors, handmade goods, and fresh food stalls. Either way, it's a W.

activities.title: Free Time — Seminyak Afternoon
activities.description: Free block — pool time, nap, grab lunch, or explore the Seminyak strip. Also a solid window to pick up souvenirs and oleh-oleh, so if you've been putting it off, now's the time. Don't wait till the last day.

activities.title: Potato Head Beach Club
activities.description: Sunset session at the legendary Potato Head. Drinks, music, and one of the best sunsets in Bali. Don't miss it.

activities.title: Free Time — Night Out
activities.description: Two hours of freedom — bar hop, explore the area, or just cruise around Seminyak at night. Regroup by 22:00.

activities.title: Back to Villa & Rest Up
activities.description: Time to call it a night. Head back to the villa, wind down, and get some proper rest for the last day.

activities.title: Free Time — Last Morning
activities.description: Final free block in Bali. Sleep in, take a last dip in the pool, or use this window to grab any remaining oleh-oleh. This is your last chance — don't sleep on it.

activities.title: Checkout Villa
activities.description: Pack everything up, double-check the rooms, and check out. Don't leave anything behind — seriously, check under the bed.

activities.title: Lunch Together — TBD
activities.description: One last meal together as a squad. Location TBD — we'll figure it out on the day. Whatever it is, make it count.

activities.title: Checkpoint at Ngurah Rai
activities.description: Everyone meet up at Ngurah Rai International Airport. Do a headcount, sort out luggage, and get ready to check in.

activities.title: Flight Boarding — Back to Jakarta
activities.description: Board the flight home. Bali was real — now it's time to bring those memories back to the mainland.

activities.title: Flight OTW Jakarta ✈️
activities.description: We're up in the air. Sit back, relax, and let the Bali vibes marinate one last time before reality hits.

activities.title: Touchdown Jakarta
activities.description: We made it back safe and sound. Welcome home, everyone. Jakarta hits different after Bali.

activities.title: Grateful & Heading Home
activities.description: Take a moment — the planning paid off, the trip was a banger, and everyone got home safe. That's a W. Now go home, hug your family, and rest up.

activities.title: HAKA Dimsum Siliwangi — Depok
activities.description: EVALUASI
